title: contact_query invalidArguments for negative position/limit lacks description
description: contact_query returns {"type":"invalidArguments"} for position < 0 or limit < 0 with no description field naming the offending parameter. A client hitting this gets no signal about which of the two fields is negative — it must inspect both. The space_set and contact_set errors all include "properties":[...] with the offending key; this error is the outlier. Fix: split the check into two branches and include a description: if position < 0 { return method_error_with_desc("invalidArguments", "position must be non-negative") }. Scenario: a client with a pagination bug sets position=-1 and gets a bare invalidArguments with no pointer to the field.
